name: Bonnie Adult Cat Food – Lamb & Rice 0.5kg
shortDescription: Give your cat the nourishment it deserves with Bonnie Chicken Adult Cat Food — a premium, fully balanced recipe designed by expert nutritionists. Enriched with high-quality chicken meal and lamb protein, it provides essential amino acids for strong muscles and sustained energy. The addition of flaxseed delivers Omega 3 & 6 fatty acids that promote healthy skin, a glossy coat, and overall vitality in adult cats of all breeds.
description: Bonnie Chicken Adult Cat food , full-balanced, lamb protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. Chicken meal has been used as animal protein source. The balance of omega 3 & 6 is provided by using flaxseed . Yucca plant provides ammonia and odour control, increase absorption of nutrients, strengthens the immune system and optimises animal growth and performance. A good intestinal health and performance is provided by CitriStim which is a source of pathogen-binding manna oligsacharrides , beta-glucans and immune-supportive yeast. Healthy skin and shiny coat is supported by using brewer’s yeast . Muscles, organs and nerve cells are supported, and the immune system strengthened by using whey powder . Rich vitamin contents. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein……………….33% Fat ………………… 13% Crude Cellulose (Fiber)… 3% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein (lamb), Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Wheat Middlings, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beet, Chicken Liver Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewers Yeast, Taurine. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 – B2 – B3 (niacin) – B6 – B12 – B7 (biotin) – B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan.
